item.title: In case you missed it. China just completed the world's first implantation of a commercially approved invasive brain-computer interface (BCI). NEO, approved by China's NMPA in March 2026, is the world
item.description: pIn case you missed it.br /br /China just completed the world's first implantation of a commercially approved invasive brain-computer interface (BCI).br /br /NEO, approved by China's NMPA in March 2026, is the world's first commercially approved invasive brain implant 👀br /br /This coin-sized device

item.title: IRAN CLAIMS STRIKES ON AMAZON DATA CENTER, U.S. BASE IRAN’S REVOLUTIONARY GUARD CLAIMED IT STRUCK AMAZON DATA CENTER INFRASTRUCTURE IN BAHRAIN IN RETALIATION FOR A U.S. ATTACK ON THE DARKHOVIN NUCLEAR
item.description: pIRAN CLAIMS STRIKES ON AMAZON DATA CENTER, U.S. BASEbr /br /IRAN’S REVOLUTIONARY GUARD CLAIMED IT STRUCK AMAZON DATA CENTER INFRASTRUCTURE IN BAHRAIN IN RETALIATION FOR A U.S. ATTACK ON THE DARKHOVIN NUCLEAR PROJECT. THE IRGC ALSO SAID IT TARGETED A U.S. MILITARY BASE IN JORDAN, CLAIMING TO HAVE DE

item.title: PALO ALTO, California -- Hidden debt at U.S. tech giants swelled eightfold in roughly four years to an estimated $1.65 trillion as artificial intelligence investments ballooned, a Nikkei study shows,
item.description: pPALO ALTO, California -- Hidden debt at U.S. tech giants swelled eightfold in roughly four years to an estimated $1.65 trillion as artificial intelligence investments ballooned, a Nikkei study shows, exceeding actual debt and making it tougher for investors to assess risk.br /Nikkei examined recent

item.title: R to @SciTechera: Keep in mind! Every new quantum material is another step toward technologies we couldn't build before ♥️!
item.description: pKeep in mind!br /br /Every new quantum material is another step toward technologies we couldn't build before ♥️!/p

item.title: Towards surfacing model algorithms with meta-tokens in the J-Space
item.description: h2ispanTL;DR/span/i/h2pispanWe used J-lens on Qwen3.6-27B to find “meta-tokens”: tokens that surface non-obvious computation in the model. When the model reads ambiguous text, 什么意思 ("what does this mean") fires in the J-space, and steering it away makes the model answer "a boiled egg every morning i
